creator: vishwin@freebsd.org
text:
Comment on attachment 244118
[patch] use PYTHON_EXT_SUFFIX for .so

Python 2 support for this and other ports that package Python standard library components will be dropped, due to converting the port builds to PEP-517, which is not supported in Python 2. Most likely the separated components will be built as part of lang/python27, which at this point only has a few consumers remaining.
